untranslatable_reason: Strategy requires prior-year returns ranking and percentile thresholds (10th and 90th percentile decile selection) which cannot be expressed as standard technical indicators. The 'returns' indicator alone does not capture the cross-sectional decile ranking mechanism required for long/short decile construction. Additionally, calendar-date-based entry/exit (first/last trading day of January) cannot be expressed using allowed operators and indicators—this requires a custom date/time condition handler.
translation_notes: This is a mean-reversion January effect strategy that requires: (1) ranking stocks by prior-year returns and selecting bottom/top 10% deciles, (2) entering positions on a specific calendar date (first trading day of January), and (3) exiting on another specific calendar date (last trading day of January). The backtest engine would need custom functionality for percentile/decile-based ranking across a universe, as well as calendar date matching. Standard technical indicators cannot replicate cross-sectional relative ranking logic.
